productDisplayName: Doodle Kids-Boys Be Born Green Sweatshirt
description: Composition Green hooded sweatshirt made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, two front pockets, appliqued design on the front and a ribbed hem Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash in cold water Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Warm iron doodle is known for its comfort clothing for children with its high quality fabric.
